title: stevia estrellensis
intro: Stevia estrellensis, also known as Stevia rebaudiana var. estrellensis, is a plant species within the Stevia genus, native to Paraguay and Brazil. It is a plant-based sweetener that contains steviol glycosides, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stevia estrellensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural digestive aid. Stevia estrellensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
